# QueueIt

> QueueIt helps Indonesian MSMEs (UMKM) automate WhatsApp-based order queues — no app installation needed, setup in 5 minutes.

QueueIt is a SaaS platform designed for small and medium businesses in Indonesia that handle high-volume walk-in or pre-order traffic. It turns chaotic WhatsApp chats into structured, automated order flows with queue numbers, real-time status updates, and revenue dashboards.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and signup for QueueIt.
